cmdb_system_info.query: SELECT hostname, cpu_brand, cpu_physical_cores, cpu_logical_cores, physical_memory, hardware_vendor, hardware_model, hardware_serial FROM system_info;
cmdb_system_info.description: Общая информация об оборудовании: CPU, RAM, модель, серийный номер

cmdb_os_version.query: SELECT name, version, major, minor, build, platform, install_date FROM os_version;

cmdb_services.query: SELECT name, display_name, status, start_type, path, user_account FROM services WHERE start_type != 'DISABLED';

cmdb_scheduled_tasks.query: SELECT name, action, path, enabled, last_run_time, next_run_time FROM scheduled_tasks WHERE enabled = 1;

cmdb_shared_folders.query: SELECT name, path, type, description FROM shared_resources;

cmdb_groups.query: SELECT g.groupname, g.gid, gu.uid AS user_uid FROM groups g LEFT JOIN user_groups gu ON g.gid = gu.gid;

cmdb_drivers.query: SELECT device_name, inf, provider, date, version, signed FROM drivers;

cmdb_bitlocker.query: SELECT device_id, drive_letter, persistent_volume_id, protection_status, encryption_method FROM bitlocker_info;

cmdb_uptime.query: SELECT days, hours, minutes, total_seconds FROM uptime;
cmdb_uptime.description: Время работы системы с последней перезагрузки
